title: AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO COLONEL PEDRO DIAZ DULAY

chunks.text:
H. No. 3636 / 49 OG No. 9, 3805 (September, 1953)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 963, June 20, 1953 ]

AN ACT GRANTING PHILIPPINE CITIZENSHIP TO COLONEL PEDRO DIAZ DULAY

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Colonel Pedro Diaz Dulay is hereby granted Philippine citizenship.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1953.
